roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1203,42 PETITION FOR DISMISSAL FILED
MOT TO REREFER CASE FOR FINES/FEES FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,42 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,42,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA ISSET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNEDAND FILED IN COURT,/

/CAL:APPT CONFLICTS FOR MOTION TO WITHDRAW/X:THE COURT APPOINTS PETER FURST FOR MOTION TO WITHDRAW ONLY, VLASKA NGUYEN REMAINS AS COUNSEL OF RECORD,//TWS/CONTD:SENTENCING & STATUS ON MOTION TO WITHDRAW/

/CAL:FOR DISPO/AMENDCOM:ADDING CHARGE 4, 11351HS AS A FELONY/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 4/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/TWS/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 06-11-09/
/CAL:SENTENCING/X:PETER FURST IS PRESENT FOR MOTION WITHDRAW PLEA, NO MOTION FILED,/CONT/
/CAL:FOR PROOF OF MEDICAL PROBLEMS/X:COURT IS SATISFIED WITH PROOF,/STWPX/OR/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
